{{Infobox character
| name = Mistress of the Mists
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Mistress of the Mists]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, Consultant Guild Head}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Am’haranai]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|, [[The Guild|the Guild]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Consultant Guild Head}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

''See also: [[Mistress of the Mists Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Mistress of the Mists is the official title held by the head of the [[Consultant]] [[Guild]]. This position carries immense authority, as the individual appointed to this role possesses the power to override the entire [[Council of Architects]]. The title is passed down through succession by killing the previous holder. Currently, [[Shera]] holds this position, a role she was assigned after her second [[Vessel]] was bound and which [[Yala]] helped facilitate. The Mistress of the Mists maintains a unique connection to [[Bastion's Veil]], the supernatural fog surrounding the [[Gray Island]]; while others are obscured by the mist, the Mistress can see through it clearly. Additionally, she has the ability to connect her mind to her [[Soulbound Vessel]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Mistress of the Mists]] is served by an order of killers known as the [[Am’haranai]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] suggests appointing the [[Mistress of the Mists]] to lead the [[Guild]] and combat.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Mistress of the Mists]] is a desired presence for their chances.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|After [[binding]] her second [[Vessel]], [[Shera]] was granted the title of Mistress of the Mists by the [[Guild]]. This persona serves as the [[Consultant]] [[Guild Head]], a position she secured by killing her predecessor. The Mistress of the Mists maintains a connection to the [[Regents]] and eventually acknowledges [[Shera]]'s status as [[Guild Head]]. Furthermore, certain omens suggest that an individual will serve as a hood for the Mistress of the Mists.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] was named [[Mistress of the Mists]] by the [[Guild]] after [[binding]] her second [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Mistress of the Mists]] is a title or persona [[Shera]] uses.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Mistress of the Mists]] inherited her title by killing her predecessor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Mistress of the Mists]] is the [[Consultant]] [[Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|There is a connection between the [[Mistress of the Mists]] and the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Mistress of the Mists]] acknowledged [[Shera]] as [[Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The string suggests someone will be a hood for the [[Mistress of the Mists]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
